name: p003-news-timeline
description: 話題のニュースを時系列で追うWebアプリ。

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check: node --check frontend/app.js && node --check frontend/js/utils.js && node --check frontend/js/comments.js && node --check frontend/js/safe_format.js && node --check frontend/js/formatters.js && node --check frontend/js/build_filters.js && node --check frontend/js/viewed_history.js && node --check frontend/js/history.js && node --check frontend/js/timestamp.js && node --check frontend/detail.js
